'''Andur Thorsim''' was a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic Army]]. He was also a member of the Republic's [[Astrographic Survey Institute]]. He was the modern documentarian of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] he and his fellow scout [[Glaennor]] was saved by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] from an [[Oskan blood eater]] released by [[mind-witch]] [[S'ybll]].
